description_long: This object is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a robust, angular black body and a compact form factor. The main housing is constructed from a matte black material, featuring a series of ridges and rails along the top, likely for mounting accessories. On the side, there are three green rectangular indicator lights or cartridges, and a circular emblem with a stylized helmet or mask motif. The grip is a pronounced pistol-style handle, ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The front end is blocky, with a visible muzzle and a set of vent-like structures beneath the barrel, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi design. The overall appearance is utilitarian and aggressive, suitable for urban combat or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A compact, black tactical shotgun with a pistol grip, green indicator lights, and a rugged, angular design. It features a prominent top rail and a stylized emblem on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pistol grip, green indicator lights, and circular emblem, with the full length of the shotgun visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow muzzle and the width of the top rail, with the grip extending downward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but without the emblem, showing the grip and vent-like structures under the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the shotgun and the alignment of the top rail, with the grip visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, with a blocky, vented front end and no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
